mnemonics: N.E.U.R.A.L. Nets: Never Expect Uniform Results After Learning.
Think of a DEEP DIVE: Data In -> Extract Patterns -> Validate Iteratively -> Evolve.
keyPoints: Deep learning uses multi-layered neural networks to learn hierarchical representations of data.
It relies on large datasets and computational power to train models through backpropagation and gradient descent.
The models automatically discover the representations needed for detection or classification from raw data.
commonMistakes: Believing that more layers always lead to a better model, which can cause overfitting.
Using insufficient or low-quality training data, leading to a model that fails to generalize.
